description: Parameterized question PATTERNS. @team etc are filled at runtime. One pattern serves all 24 teams.

patterns.caveat: report transparent components + labels, never 0-1 scores
patterns.sample_sql: SELECT team_name, AVG(directness) d, AVG(field_tilt) tilt, AVG(progressive_share) prog, AVG(pass_completion_under_pressure) press FROM statsbomb_marts.mart_team_style_labels WHERE team_name IN (@teamA,@teamB) GROUP BY 1

patterns.pattern: Most forward vs backward passes for @team
patterns.sample_sql: SELECT passer_name, SUM(forward_passes) fwd, SUM(backward_passes) bwd FROM statsbomb_marts.mart_team_pass_network WHERE team_name=@team GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY fwd DESC

patterns.caveat: PPDA from events is a proxy
patterns.sample_sql: SELECT team_name, AVG(ppda) ppda FROM statsbomb_marts.mart_team_pressure_profile GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY ppda ASC
SELECT player_name, SUM(progressive_passes) prog, SUM(final_third_entries) f3 FROM statsbomb_marts.mart_player_match_profile WHERE team_name=@team GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY prog DESC
